info.name: Orchid Life CRM API
info.description:
NestJS REST API for Titan PB CRM (PB-CRM).

**Two local services:**
- **CRM API:** `http://localhost:3000/api/v1` (`npm run start:dev`).
- **Supabase Auth (sign-in):** `http://localhost:54321` — this is the Supabase CLI API port (GoTrue). Login is **not** implemented on :3000; the Nest app only validates JWTs.

Use **`supabase start`** locally and paste **anon / service_role** keys from `supabase status`. For **hosted** Supabase only, edit Auth request URLs to `https://YOUR_PROJECT.supabase.co` (same paths `/auth/v1/...`).

**Preferred:** **Auth (CRM API) → Login** (`/auth/login`). **First super_admin:** set `BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_SECRET` in `.env`, then **Bootstrap first super_admin** (`POST /auth/bootstrap-admin`) once (409 if already done). Variable `bootstrapAdminSecret` in Postman must match.

**Auth (local Supabase)** is optional.

**Sign in (Supabase folder):** `supabaseAnonKey`, `authEmail`, `authPassword`.

**IDs:** From API responses.

**Upload:** form-data `file`, `booking_id`, `type` (`DocType` in code).

item.name: Auth (local Supabase)
item.description: Targets **`http://localhost:54321`** (Supabase CLI). Use anon/service keys from `supabase status`. Not the CRM server (:3000). For cloud-only, change each URL host to `https://YOUR_REF.supabase.co`.

request.description: POST to **local GoTrue** (`:54321`), not Nest. Tests save `accessToken` / `refreshToken`. User must exist in Auth + `profiles` for CRM.
Uses `refreshToken` variable. Tests update `accessToken` when present.
Only works if your Supabase project allows public sign-up. Prefer **Invite manager/user** or **Create auth user (service role)** for CRM onboarding.

**Service role only.** Creates the Auth user (e.g. first super_admin). Then in Supabase SQL/Table Editor: insert or update `profiles` with `id` = returned user id and `role` = `super_admin` (or your workflow). Never expose service_role key in client apps.

item.name: Auth (CRM API)
item.description: Login via Nest (`POST /auth/login`) — same Supabase credentials; tokens apply to all other CRM requests.

request.description: Returns `{ success, data: { access_token, refresh_token, user, profile } }`. Tests store tokens in collection variables.
Requires `BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_SECRET` in API `.env`. Fails with 409 if a super_admin already exists. Saves tokens like Login.

item.name: Meta (localhost)
item.description: Utility routes on the same dev server (`http://localhost:3000`). Open Swagger in a browser to browse all operations.

request.description: HTML UI for OpenAPI. Default: `http://localhost:3000/api/docs` while `npm run start:dev` is running.

request.description: Requires `super_admin` JWT. Creates invitation + profile path per API; `role` is `manager`. Optional `project_ids`, `manager_id`.
Requires `super_admin` JWT. `role` is `user`. Link to a manager via `manager_id` when applicable.

{
  "section_id": "{{sectionId}}",
  "field_key": "applicant_full_name",
  "field_label": "Full name",

  "is_required": true,
  "visible_to_user": true,
  "editable_by_user": true,
  "display_order": 0,
  "placeholder": "As per PAN"
}

request.description: Body → form-data: attach `file`, set text fields `booking_id`, `type` (e.g. aadhar_card, pan_card, payment_receipt). Optional: allottee_index, notes.
